registration.title: Device Registration
registration.description: This information is used exclusively to recover your account if you lose /n  or change your device. Therefore, you agree that this confidential information will be securely stored in a strongly protected database and will never be shared with any third party under any circumstances.
registration.acceptTerms: I accept that my data will be stored securely for account recovery purposes.
registration.urlDescription: Enter the API base URL for the new profile. The app will request fresh device credentials from this endpoint before asking for the user details.
